message:
feat(tui): add semantic typography hierarchy with 6 strata and tests

Adds text_title, text_section, text_primary, text_meta, text_hint, and
text_disabled style functions for consistent visual hierarchy across TUI
screens. Includes tests for distinct strata properties and cross-theme
consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
